behavior_summary: When the player examines the GREENTRE object, the U8P_GREENTRE::look process displays a single short description string ('tree') and then suspends/terminates further U8P_GREENTRE::look processing.
There is no branching, menu, dialogue, or external calls; behavior is a static short-description handler for a U8P_GREENTRE::look/examine action.
notable_control_flow: Single linear flow: entry -> emit bark 'tree' -> suspend/terminate the process.
No conditional branches, iterations, or external interactions are present.
open_questions: Does the inferred 'suspend' node fully terminate the U8P_GREENTRE::look process or merely pause it for engine scheduling? (confidence: low)
Is this object referenced by any other scripts or systems that would reuse or override the U8P_GREENTRE::look behavior? (confidence: low)

main_function.name: U8P_GREENTRE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player uses the Look/Examine action on the GREENTRE object (emit a single bark 'tree' then end or suspend the U8P_GREENTRE::look process).
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player examines/looks at the GREENTRE object.
Registered as a U8P_GREENTRE::look-type process (processType 0x0208) so it is invoked on inspection.

function_map.name: U8P_GREENTRE::look
function_map.role: Handle the object's U8P_GREENTRE::look/examine event and present a short description.
